Nodes: [DEFAULT] Access control lib Create new DTO which has documentIdentifier, DocumentType, model, sensitivity,  Publication Type, Supplement Type, Product Format and Volume Type Accessv2 In getEntitledCustomers () of ProductEntitlementService.java based on toggle(true) call new method removeConditionalPolicyCustomers We will build ConditionalBusinessPolicySearchRequestDTO with policy, status, operator, documentIdentifier, DocumentType, model, sensitivity, Publication Type, Supplement Type, Product Format and Volume Type from ProductInstanceDTO. From the returned response of conditionalBusinessPoliciesDto we will get bsd  If bsd is empty or all  then clear the entitlement list else  remove bsd from entitlement list                                In getEntitlement of UserEntitlementServiceImpl.java Based on toggle(true) call new endpoint /fetchCBPBySearchRequestDTO with ConditionalBusinessPolicySearchRequestDTO having policy, status, operator, documentIdentifier, DocumentType, model, sensitivity,  Publication Type, Supplement Type, Product Format and Volume Type  also need to pass all fields to endpoint “/getEntitlement” from dataadapter | [INPUT] Tbh_config_dev and tbh_config_prod Add feature toggle in accessv2, productv2, metadata, data adapter and dataadmin yml. | [DEFAULT] ProductV2  In canAccessBasedOnControlAccessPolicy of ProductAuthorizationService.java Based on toggle(true) call endpoint pass new fields also  Publication Type, Supplement Type, Product Format and Volume Type to  /fetchCBPBySearchRequestDTO with ConditionalBusinessPolicySearchRequestDTO having policy, status, operator, documentIdentifier, DocumentType, model, sensitivity, Publication Type, Supplement Type, Product Format and Volume Type  from ProductInstance    In handleAccessControlPolicyUpdate of ConditionalBusinessPolicyService.java  At least one of the fields in conditionalBusinessPoliciesDto should have value.  If not, then do nothing If yes Along with document Identifier, sensitivity, document Type and Model also check Publication Type, Supplement Type, Product Format and Volume Type  if are present. If yes, then get product instance Id from productInstanceRepository(Create specification query) based on these fields and trigger reindexing for those pids. | [DEFAULT] Metadata In endpoint fetchCBPBySearchRequestDTO  in ConditionalBusinessPolicyController.java. build search Request Specification query for  Publication Type, Supplement Type, Product Format and Volume Type. (Create specification query).
